Mod 2 -Welcome (Completed 05/08/18)
Transcript by Rev.com
Page 1 of 2
Speaker 1: All right, well, welcome back to the training. We are now in module two. I'd just like to
take a second to congratulate you for making it through module one. I know it was
loaded with a ton of new big concepts, and paradigm shifts, and just a new approach for
writing your sales messaging, so I do want to congratulate you on making it through that
initial big hurdle. Hopefully your brain cells have had a chance to decompress and really
absorb everything that we presented in that one. But acknowledging that a conversion
is nothing but the transformation between A and point buyer, which was a major
premise in module one. In module two, we're actually going to start mapping out that
transformation, and particularly how it looks across your funnel.
So here is how module two is going to break down. In lesson one, you are going to get
an introduction to the buyer's journey. You'll see an overview of it, and this is really
what we mean by that transformation between point A and point buyer. You'll also see
the seven key milestones that need to be achieved over the course of that journey, and
how the five subsequences work together as a vehicle to deliver it. However, before we
can really expect a buyer to embark on a journey, he kind of needs to be brought to life.
Makes sense, right? A static, lifeless, 2D avatar can't really move, so that's why in lesson
two, you are going to get introduced to the three-dimensional ever-evolving avatar.
That sounds like a mouthful, that's okay. We really do want to add all these aspects and
sense to our avatar, give them some life, breathe some life into your avatar.
So this is going to give you a chance to really go beyond traditional empathy mapping.
Make them feel like a real, living, breathing human, which they are. That's kind of the
mind-blowing concept, they are a living, breathing, feeling, human and acknowledging
that will really start giving you the keys to engineer those ah-ha moments, that build
trust and allow you the right to lead them down that journey. So in this module, you will
get the 47 Golden Questions workbook that we alluded to early as well as two other
really powerful exercises that I turn to every time I start a new project with a client. And
whenever I do get blocked, I always turn back to these two exercises. These two
exercises alone tend to really unlock a lot of insights, a lot of hooks for emails, and
messages, and I really encourage you to spend the time on these two exercises as well,
so you're going to get introduced to that in lesson two.
In lesson three, we're actually going to travel all the way to the other end of the journey
and look at what a buyer really is. Sounds like a pretty basic and even stupid question,
what is a buyer? But once you unpack it, actually looking at the conditions that have to
be present for a transaction to occur is a pretty powerful exercise, so it's all about
starting with the end in mind. And you'll see in lesson three how the way we've
traditionally defined a buyer might actually be sabotaging our sales and scaring off
would be customers. So that's module two at a glance. By the end of this module, I want
you to have a clearer, more intimate, and vivid picture of your avatar, which will then
allow you to connect more deeply with your messaging, and generate those sacred
wow, he or she gets me moments.
You're also going to have a full understanding of your prospect's starting point, or their
initial context as it relates to your product and the pain it solves. You will get a picture of
what they'll look like at the end of the journey. What do they look like as a successful,
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

empowered customer? What do they believe? How do they feel? What is their attitude
around your product, around your market, around competitors? So you're going to take
a look at that, the anatomy of a buyer.
And finally, you're gonna connect those two points, point A and point buyer, and know
the seven milestones that you need to hit along the way. And armed with these insights,
will then be ready to leverage the five core subsequences, the segmentation, the
confirmation, the prelaunch, the launch, the sales, and the closing to deliver the highly
tailored and focused messaging that moves your prospect through those milestones and
finally onto being a customer. So when you're ready, take out your notebooks, your
Evernote folder, wherever you're organizing your notes for this course, and meet me in
lesson one where we will go deeper to the buyer's journey. I'll see you there.
